response.justification: Bogdan brings 15+ years of broad engineering experience across web, mobile, and systems contexts, with genuine scale exposure at Dunnhumby (millions of HTTP requests per second) and Shopify (millions of physical mail sends), and a current Staff Engineer role at Stripe. However, the resume contains no discernible evidence of the domain expertise this role is fundamentally built around: experimentation platforms, A/B testing infrastructure, feature flagging, rollout automation, telemetry pipelines, or growth measurement systems. The background skews toward general full-stack and systems engineering. There is also no evidence of the multi-workstream cross-organizational technical leadership expected at Principal/IC6 scope, nor of data science collaboration, statistical methods, or experimental analysis.
strengths: 15+ years of progressively senior engineering experience, culminating in a Staff Engineer role at Stripe, with demonstrated ability to ramp across domains and stacks

High-throughput distributed systems exposure at Dunnhumby (millions of req/s, low-latency async I/O, caching) and Shopify (multi-country pricing at scale) satisfies the distributed systems prerequisite
Recent AI-agent infrastructure and MCP framework contributions at Stripe align with the role's preference for engineers who leverage AI tooling to accelerate velocity
concerns: Zero mention of experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, feature flags, or experiment assignment and targeting systems — the primary engineering domain of this role
No evidence of telemetry pipeline ownership, metrics infrastructure, or instrumentation work; growth measurement is absent from every position described
No demonstrated cross-team technical leadership at Principal scope: no examples of architecting systems adopted by multiple teams, driving org-wide standards, or leading multi-workstream initiatives

key_factors.factor: No experimentation or growth systems domain experience
No telemetry or metrics infrastructure ownership
Scale and distributed systems background at Dunnhumby and Shopify
